Package index

Core plot functions

activity_snake()
Activity Snake Plot
line_snake()
Line Snake Plot (Experimental)
multi_snake()
Multi-Sequence Snake Plot
sequence_snake()
Sequence Index Snake Plot
facet_snake()
Faceted Snake Plot
survey_snake()
Survey Snake Plot
timeline_snake()
Timeline Snake Plot
survey_sequence()
Survey Sequence Plot
sequential_dist()
Sequential Distribution Plot

Utilities

snake_palette()
Get a Snake Plot Palette

Datasets

ema_beeps
EMA Beep-Level Data (Daily Emotions)
ema_emotions
EMA Emotion Ratings (Person-Level)
snake_palettes
Built-in Color Palettes
student_survey
Student Survey (Cross-Sectional, Multi-Construct)
